data.title: WuXi XDC (stock code: 2268.HK) has been included in the MSCI China All Share Index, a leading CRDMO - Aug. 8, 2025.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, WuXi XDC Cayman Inc. (stock code: 2268.HK) based in Shanghai, a prominent Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization specializing in the bioconjugate sector, revealed its addition to the MSCI China All Share Index.

data.title: New VIXI ETF by Defiance offers enhanced long volatility with short S&P 500 leverage.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by approximately 4.5% in the upcoming year. The United States is expected to see a growth rate of around 5%, surpassing the overall global average. Additionally, China is forecasted to experience a growth rate of about 8% in the same period, showing significant resilience and recovery from the impact of the pandemic. These numbers indicate a positive trend in the world economy, with key players like the US and China driving growth and stability.

data.title: QuickBooks AI marketing tool with Mailchimp automation named top by Better Business Advice, for small businesses.
data.description: In a recent announcement on August 8, 2025, Better Business Advice named QuickBooks as one of the leading AI marketing tools of the year. This recognition highlighted the new Mailchimp-powered marketing agent as a notable advancement for small and mid-sized businesses seeking to enhance their personalized marketing strategies. QuickBooks' innovative approach has garnered attention as a key tool for companies striving to expand their marketing efforts effectively.

data.title: 23 media reps from 12 countries visited Xi'an to learn about China's railway development at Xitie Education and Training Base.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Beijing, a group of 23 media representatives hailing from 12 countries across Asia and Africa embarked on a visit to the Xitie Education and Training Base located in Xi'an, China. The purpose of the visit was to delve into the contemporary training approach adopted by China's railway system. The delegation had the opportunity to witness firsthand the innovative training methods being employed at the facility.

data.title: IVD Medical invests HK$149M in Ethereum through HashKey Exchange, a licensed virtual asset trading platform in Hong Kong.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Hong Kong, the largest virtual asset trading platform in the region, HashKey Exchange, announced a strategic partnership with IVD Medical Holdings Limited, a publicly listed company on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. This collaboration aims to enhance the trading experience for users and investors, as well as provide innovative solutions in the virtual asset market. This partnership signifies a significant move in the industry, as the two entities, with their respective expertise and market positions, look forward to maximizing opportunities in the rapidly evolving virtual asset landscape.

data.title: BTC's "fair" price is $167K as per Bitcoin Energy Value metric. Analysis shows it's 31% undervalued; hash rate reaches records.
data.description: Analysis shows that Bitcoin is currently undervalued by 31% when compared to its energy-based "fair" price. This discrepancy comes as the hash rate of Bitcoin continues to reach new record highs.

data.title: Traka, an ASSA ABLOY company, marks 30 years of key and asset management innovation impacting over 30 industries worldwide.
data.description: Traka, a subsidiary of ASSA ABLOY, a global leader in intelligent key and equipment management solutions, is celebrating its 30th anniversary. Originally designed as a bespoke system for British Airways, Traka has evolved into a prominent player in the industry. Operating in over 30 sectors globally, the company has made a significant impact through its innovative solutions for key and asset management. Its growth and success over the past three decades highlight its commitment to providing cutting-edge technology to various industries.

data.title: Animoca and Standard Chartered join forces in Hong Kong to create Anchorpoint Financial for licensed HKD stablecoin.
data.description: Standard Chartered's Hong Kong branch has partnered with Animoca Brands to establish a new entity called Anchorpoint Financial. This collaboration aims to create a licensed stablecoin pegged to the Hong Kong dollar.

data.title: Aurora Mobile integrates GPT-5 into GPTBots.ai to enhance AI solutions for global enterprise customers.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on August 8, 2025, Aurora Mobile Limited (NASDAQ: JG), a prominent provider of customer engagement and marketing technology services in China, shared that its AI agent platform, GPTBots.ai, has successfully incorporated GPT-5, the most recent large language model (LLM) developed by OpenAI. With this integration, GPTBots.ai can provide enhanced AI solutions to enterprise customers worldwide, facilitating the quicker adoption and progression of enterprise AI applications for improved efficiency and intelligence.
